evidence_summary: Establish the physical threat of the Apache presence through a transition from quiet observation to high-intensity combat. The sequence must move from wide environmental scale to tight, handheld chaos to emphasize the suddenness of the ambush.
Carter notices suspicious movement in the valley. Suspecting an ambush, he pursues the trail and discovers a large Apache camp on a plateau, leading to a chaotic skirmish.
